prompt: Ops is getting 502 errors from our checkout service and nobody knows why. Here's the capture from the checkout host: /sessions/sweet-trusting-darwin/mnt/pcap_analysis_sandbox/pcaps/eval-dns-cascade.pcap. Is this a DNS problem, a backend problem, or both? I need a short writeup for the incident ticket.

assertions.description: Report names at least one of the failing newsvc.* domains
Report identifies HTTP 502 Bad Gateway responses
Report names the backend IP 10.0.3.5 that returned the 502s
Report discusses both DNS failures AND backend failures (not just one)
Report cites specific frame numbers as evidence
Output has a headed structure with TL;DR or executive summary plus findings
